home.storageUnavailable: Mnemo fonctionne mieux lorsque le stockage est disponible. Certains navigateurs le bloquent en mode privé.
home.empty: Rien ici pour l'instant. Commence par une pensée - quelque chose que tu voudrais retrouver dans un an.

firstResurfacing.label: Première résurgence
firstResurfacing.message_one: Dans {{count}} jour, ta première pensée revient.
firstResurfacing.message_other: Dans {{count}} jours, ta première pensée revient.
firstResurfacing.empty: Enregistre ta première pensée - elle reviendra dans 7 jours.

dailyPrompt.label: Inspiration
prompts: What did you learn today that you'd want to remember?
What surprised you this week?
What would you want to find here a year from now?
What decision are you facing right now?
What are you afraid of losing?
What has changed in you recently?
What do you keep coming back to?
What did you almost say, but didn't?
What do you want to remember about today?
What is pulling your attention right now?
What belief of yours has shifted lately?
What would your future self thank you for noticing?
What is something you understood differently today?
What are you holding onto that you might need to release?
What made you feel most like yourself recently?
What question keeps coming back to you?
What do you know now that you didn't know a month ago?
What are you becoming?
What would you regret not writing down?
What is quietly true about your life right now?
What are you grateful for that you haven't said out loud?
What has been harder than you expected?
What has been easier than you expected?
What do you want to remember about this phase of your life?
What are you pretending not to know?
What small thing has mattered more than expected?
What conversation changed something in you?
What have you been avoiding thinking about?
What do you stand for right now?
What is the most honest thing you could write today?

capture.title: Nouveau fragment
capture.saved: Enregistré. Il reviendra quand le moment sera venu.

unsaved.title: Fragment non enregistré
unsaved.message: Tu n'as pas encore enregistré ce fragment. L'enregistrer ou en écrire un nouveau ?

unsavedAudio.title: Transcris et enregistre d'abord
unsavedAudio.message: Transcris cet enregistrement et sauvegarde-le avant d'en commencer un nouveau. Ou jette-le et recommence.

record.notSupported: L'enregistrement audio n'est pas pris en charge dans ce navigateur.
record.instruction: Appuie sur le microphone pour enregistrer jusqu'à 30 secondes.
record.transcriptHint: Modifie la transcription avant d'enregistrer si nécessaire.
record.transcriptEmpty: La transcription ne peut pas être vide.

archive.title: Archive
archive.empty: Ton archive est vide. Chaque fragment que tu enregistres vivra ici.

resurface.explanation_one: Ce fragment a refait surface parce que tu l'as écrit il y a {{count}} jour.
resurface.explanation_other: Ce fragment a refait surface parce que tu l'as écrit il y a {{count}} jours.
resurface.notDueYet: Ce fragment n'est pas encore prêt à refaire surface.

fragmentItem.removeConfirm: Supprimer ce fragment ? Cette action est irréversible.

reactions.archivedNote: Archivé. Il ne refera plus surface.
